'''Ahleazah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] healer who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Captured during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] occupation of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]], Ahleazah's skills as a healer earned her work with medical staff, while her family was put to forced labor. Ahleazah put her skills to use helping whomever she could as the occupation authority moved her from camp to camp. Her actions in saving a low level [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] officer earned her escape from the enslaved world. She was placed aboard his starship where she was able to make use of and learn from the advanced Imperial medical technologies.

While aboard the Imperial vessel, Ahleazah tended to a captured [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who was slated to undergo interrogation. Ahleazah aided the pilot and seized the opportunity to escape the Empire. Together the pair stowed away in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] and launched just as the ship exited the [[Anoat system/Legends|Anoat system]]. An Alliance convoy picked up the drifting pod, and Ahleazah went on to serve the Alliance and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as a healer.
